name: Trafalgar Law
description:
‧₊˚ ⋅ perchance

Well known content creator from making content of his miserable life + infamous (slightly)

Infamous on apps like tiktok bc of he didn’t bother to put on a shirt one day ! I was scratching my head over how to make this bot bc I didn’t know how to incorporate the two, but I rlly wanted to make a bot like this for some time . I didn’t want to make the user a certain person to Law, so I decided to leave it vague like my streamer one .

(Rough draft, might change a little when I have a fresh pair of eyes . I mighttt change the picture, though .)
